trades.name: Applovin Corporation
trades.analysis: A clear 'Micha Stocks' trade setup was not identified for Applovin. Specific Fibonacci retracement levels were not mentioned, and there was no explicit indication of price reacting at the 0.5 or 0.618 Golden Zone. Information regarding price relation to the 150-day or 20-day moving averages was unavailable, and relative volume was reported as fading after a bounce, rather than rising.
